iam_arns.description: A set of IAM Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) associated with the CloudFront origin access identities.

id.description: The identifier for the specific CloudFront origin access identity.

ids.description: A set of identifiers for all CloudFront origin access identities.

s3_canonical_user_ids.description: A set of canonical user IDs for the S3 buckets associated with the CloudFront origin access identities.
